The '''Galactic Alliance Special Forces''' were the military [[Special forces/Legends|special operations]] unit of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]], specifically part of the [[Galactic Alliance Army]]. They were formed from the [[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|New Republic Special Forces]].

During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] members of the [[967 Commando]]s were combined with members of the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] and the [[Galactic Alliance Intelligence Service]] to form the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]].

In [[44 ABY]], Special Forces [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] unknowingly chased members of [[Wraith Squadron]] for heisting a military transport. During the resulting fight, several troopers were killed.
